programme.desc: A short, cheeky clip featuring animals and food, from the always hilarious Tube that is Rude.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: PJ's Steakhouse: In New York, Gordon Ramsay visits PJ's Steakhouse, where owners Joe and Madalyn are in serious debt and struggling to keep the high-end restaurant afloat.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Fleming: Gordon Ramsay visits Fleming, a Danish restaurant in Miami. Once the best family-run restaurant in town, it's now losing money fast.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: The Opportunity of a Lifetime: Barry gets the chance to throw the first pitch at a Phillies baseball game. Erica makes an important decision about her future.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Spaceballs: Adam tries to start a Mel Brooks club after watching the movie Spaceballs. Erica plans to tell Beverly and Pops about a big decision she's made.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Red Alert: Lily has reached a womanly milestone that Cam and Mitch are not at all prepared for. So they call in reinforcements...

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Wild: Mitch, Cam and Phil crash Jay's annual hiking trip to find an elusive bald eagle. And Gloria, Alex, Claire and Haley get together to plan a baby shower.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Sushi Ko: Akira and Lisa are losing up to $20,000 a month at their sushi restaurant in California. Can Gordon piece the family back together and save the restaurant?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Lido Di Manhattan: Ambitious graduate Lisa bought her restaurant in California at just 23 but, five years later, she's worried she picked the wrong venture. Can Gordon help?

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Halloween IV: It's Halloween, so the squad follow precinct tradition and compete for the title of Ultimate Detective Slash Genius.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Monster in the Closet: When Pimento and Diaz decide to tie the knot, the squad try to prepare the perfect wedding under Santiago's careful direction.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Insane Clown Poppy: Homer and Bart take Lisa to a book fair, where Krusty meets his long-lost daughter (guest star Drew Barrymore). But it doesn't go well...

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa the Tree Hugger: A dramatic rooftop protest at Krusty Burger inspires Lisa to become an eco-radical - especially when she sees how cute one of the protestors is...

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: The Living Room: A 100% True Story: Barry's worried about Murray's health, so he asks his friends and Coach Mellor to help him get fit.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Bachelor Party: Barry thinks he wants a wild bachelor party, but when he's confronted with the reality, he realises that Adam's idea of a low-key event is more his speed.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Pool Party: Mitch and Cam help Lily overcome her insecurities about wearing a bathing suit to a pool party, but discover that they have their own self-doubts.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Last Halloween: Phil's determined to scare Claire on Halloween. And for the first time, Gloria is self-conscious about her age when someone correctly assumes she's Jay's wife.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The Last Ride: Peralta and Boyle go to extremes to catch a bike thief. Diaz soothes Jeffords' ego after a professional setback. Santiago spends time with Holt.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Moo Moo: Jeffords wants to file a complaint against a fellow police officer who stops him in his own neighbourhood while he's off duty, but Holt has other ideas.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Day of the Jackanapes: Sideshow Bob swears revenge on Krusty for accidentally erasing the first 10 years of their programme.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: New Kids on the Blecch: After cheating in the Springfield Marathon, Bart is rescued from an angry mob by a record producer and is recruited for a new boy band.

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: After months of torment and pain, Dodger finally has his chance to expose Sully for what he really is, but Sully's ready to fight dirty...

programme.title: MAFS UK Does Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Canny lad Kieran Chapman hopes to tickle his guests' fancy with a clown-themed carnival of delights. But is serving dessert with chopsticks a joke too far? (Ep2/5)

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off...
programme.desc: ...for Stand Up To Cancer: Daisy Ridley, Rob Beckett, Alexandra Burke and Tom Allen make millionaire's shortbread, a fruity tart and a showstopping cake of their pet hates.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers have been watching Michael McIntyre's The Wheel, Jamie's £1 Wonders, Top Gear, Guillermo del Toro's Cabinet of Curiosities, and Wild Croc Territory.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Will it be first love for inexperienced Ed and Purdey, and can Peter recover from an embarrassing faux pas?

programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: (2014) Thriller. Denzel Washington stars as an ex-soldier who comes out of retirement to help a teenage sex worker who's been assaulted by her pimp.

programme.title: The Frighteners
programme.desc: (1996) Peter Jackson's comedy horror stars Michael J Fox as a psychic investigator in a town that has more ghouls and ghosties than you can shake a spirit stick at. But is he a fraud?

programme.title: Boss Level
programme.desc: (2020) Groundhog day shoot 'em up with Frank Grillo, Naomi Watts and Mel Gibson. Ray gets killed every day. Can he escape by unravelling the mystery of why a bunch of people want him dead?

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: The Major and the Minor
programme.desc: (1942) Ginger Rogers stars in this comedy of romantic misadventure. A woman poses as a girl to get a cheap rail fare. But things get awkward when she falls for a man who helps her out.

programme.title: First Knight
programme.desc: (1995) Romantic drama based on Arthurian legend, starring Richard Gere, Sean Connery and Julia Ormond. Can nomadic swordsman Lancelot contain his love for King Arthur's fiancée?

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
programme.desc: (2019) Adventure comedy sequel with Dwayne Johnson, Jack Black, Kevin Hart and Karen Gillan. The old school pals enter the Jumanji video game again to save their friend.

programme.title: Bridge of Spies
programme.desc: (2015) Tom Hanks and Mark Rylance star in Steven Spielberg's Cold War spy drama. After gaining notoriety for defending a Soviet spy, a US lawyer then tries to free a CIA pilot.

programme.title: Bridge of Spies Interview Special
programme.desc: Director Steven Spielberg and stars Tom Hanks and Mark Rylance talk about making their Cold War espionage drama.

programme.title: Deja Vu
programme.desc: (2006) Pulsating sci-fi action with Denzel Washington and Val Kilmer. An AFT agent uses new technology to reach back in time, stop a ferry bombing, and save the love of his life. Simple.

programme.title: Ambulance
programme.desc: (2022) Michael Bay's high-octane thriller with Jake Gyllenhaal. After a bodged heist, two brothers try to evade the LAPD in an ambulance, while a paramedic operates on a cop in the back.

programme.title: Fire Will Come
programme.desc: (2019) Oliver Laxe's psychological drama follows Amador, a convicted arsonist, as he returns home from prison to his small community. In Galician and Spanish/subs.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: The Rare Breed
programme.desc: (1966) Western with Maureen O'Hara and James Stewart. With the help of a drifter, a widow strives to fulfil her husband's last wish to introduce rare cattle to the perilous American west.

programme.title: The Guns of Fort Petticoat
programme.desc: (1957) Western. A Union army deserter sets out to turn his Texan hometown's womenfolk into sharpshooters in order to repel a Comanche attack. Starring Audie Murphy and Kathryn Grant.

programme.title: Yellow Sky
programme.desc: (1949) Western. Gregory Peck plays the leader of an outlaw gang whose plans to rob an old man and his granddaughter of their gold go seriously awry. With Anne Baxter and Richard Widmark.

programme.title: The Lavender Hill Mob
programme.desc: (1951) Classic Ealing comedy starring Alec Guinness as a mild-mannered bank clerk who assembles a gang to hijack a million quid's worth of gold. Which is when their problems really start...

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: (2019) Greta Gerwig's Oscar-winning period drama adaptation of the classic Louisa May Alcott novel, starring Emma Watson, Saoirse Ronan, Florence Pugh, Timothée Chalamet and Meryl Streep.

programme.title: The Menu
programme.desc: (2022) Horror with Ralph Fiennes and Anya Taylor-Joy. Only one diner at an exclusive eatery sees through the foam quenelles to the pile of steaming prairie oysters beyond. Mayhem ensues.

programme.title: Rocketman
programme.desc: (2019) Taron Egerton is Elton John in Dexter Fletcher's sequins-and-all biopic musical drama. With Jamie Bell as lyricist Bernie Taupin and Stephen Graham as Dick James.

programme.title: Enduring Love
programme.desc: (2004) In Roger Michell's drama, when Daniel Craig and Rhys Ifans witness a fatal ballooning accident, it arouses a violent obsession in one for the other. Strong language/violence.

programme.title: Magnificent Obsession
programme.desc: (1954) Douglas Sirk's melodrama starring Rock Hudson and Jane Wyman. A playboy reforms his lifestyle in order to seek forgiveness from a woman whose husband's death he inadvertently caused.

programme.title: The Frogmen
programme.desc: (1951) Second World War thriller. Richard Widmark, Dana Andrews and Robert Wagner star as divers with a special underwater demolition team taking the war to the Japanese in the Pacific.

programme.title: It Should Happen to You
programme.desc: (1954) Judy Holliday stars in this comedy as a smalltown girl who comes to New York and rents a billboard to publicise her name - and soon she's a TV star. With Jack Lemmon.

programme.title: Destination Gobi
programme.desc: (1953) Fact-based Second World War adventure. Richard Widmark stars as a US Navy officer who leads an alliance of scientists and tribesmen against the Japanese in Mongolia.

programme.title: Entrapment
programme.desc: (1999) Action thriller starring Sean Connery as Robert 'Mac' MacDougal, one of the world's finest art thieves, and Catherine Zeta-Jones as the insurance company agent out to trap him.

programme.title: Orphan: First Kill
programme.desc: (2022) Horror prequel with Isabelle Fuhrman and Julia Stiles. Diminutive psychopath Esther - think Wednesday at a funeral - cons her way into a family to wreak murderous mayhem.
